user_goal: B062 hk_china 真数据地基（Batch 1：港股 provider + A股/港股进 trade 管道 + 数据质量验实）。来源：B061 A 股 lookup done 后，用户决定把 Master 的 hk_china sleeve(现 US-listed ETF proxy MCHI/FXI/KWEB/ASHR)换成**真 A股+港股、最终进 live Master**(用户两选：直接全套上真金 Master + A股+港股都要)。**这是真金策略改动→planner 坚持纪律：分 3 批，激活闸控于回测**：Batch 1=B062(本批,数据地基,research-safe,不碰推荐)；Batch 2=FX 层+real-data hk_china 策略+★回测对比(real vs proxy)决策点；Batch 3=激活 live Master(★真金,闸控于 Batch 2 回测favorable+用户确认,Master 硬回归不破)。**诚实前提**：现 proxy(美元 ETF 持真实中国公司)已合法暴露无 FX/管道复杂度；hk_china 最小(10%)最弱 sleeve;换真须证明值这堆复杂度(Batch 2 回测把关)。**本批范围(数据地基 research-safe)**：港股 .HK 市场+HK provider(lookup,镜像 B061)；真 A股+港股进 trade 管道(akshare 进 data_refresh→统一 CSV，trade/ 仍离线只读 CSV 守 B061 边界)；候选 universe 数据质量验实(B061 延后的 §8 深指标:全历史/复权/一致性,评分依赖)。**不做(延后)**：FX(Batch 2)/real-data hk_china 策略(Batch 2)/回测(Batch 2)/激活 live Master(Batch 3)/任何 live 推荐改动。候选 universe(代表集,最终 Batch 2 定)：港股 0700.HK 腾讯/9988.HK 阿里/3690.HK 美团/1810.HK 小米+A股 600519.SH 茅台/000858.SZ 五粮液/300750.SZ 宁德。4 features 3g+1c：F001 港股 symbology+HK provider；F002 A股/港股进 trade 管道(最重最危,碰 Master 评分读的 CSV)；F003 数据质量验实工具；F004 codex HK lookup+真数据进 CSV+§8 质量实测+★US/Master 不破+signoff。硬边界：**research-only 本批不碰 live 推荐**(hk_china 仍跑 proxy)/★**Master/US 数据管道零回归**(data_refresh 加 A股/港股不破 US 数据,Master 评分读它)/trade 仍离线(akshare 在 workbench data_refresh,trade/ 不 import,AST 守门)/no-broker(只 akshare/baostock)/§12.10.2/EOD+币种诚实/新路由 next.config(§20)/mypy CI-exact(§19)。spec docs/specs/B062-hk-china-real-data-foundation-spec.md(6 章)。复用 B061 SymbolRef+B059 provider 抽象+symbol_price_cache+data_refresh 管道。

evaluator_feedback.summary: ✅ S1 缺陷闭合 + S2/S3 验证框架就绪。L1 全门禁 PASS(1331/0/0)✓。L2 S1 HK LOOKUP 缺陷修复验证✓(0700.HK→5405 rows 真腾讯 2026-06-12 463.6; 9988/3690/1810 可达)。修复代码 af57842 已部署(hk_provider.py stock_hk_daily替代东财的超时 stock_hk_hist，改用 sina 端点，B060 已验可达)✓。S2/S3 框架：S2=data_refresh 拉 CN/HK→CSV+§8 quality runner；S3=Master 推荐 pre/post 零回归。本批研究态 hk_china 仍 proxy 不碰推荐。下一步：Planner 决策 S2/S3 执行 vs Batch 2 规划。

generator_handoff.summary: B062 fix-round 1 (B062-F001-PROD-1, HIGH): prod 0700.HK lookup failed. Generator fixed + verified LOCALLY with real data. status fixing -> reverifying. Codex must reverify on prod/VM with REAL evidence (the real-data acceptance skipped in F004).
generator_handoff.root_cause: hk_provider used akshare stock_hk_hist -> hits eastmoney HK push host 33.push2his.eastmoney.com, which READ-TIMES-OUT reproducibly. Diagnosed LOCALLY (akshare 1.18.64): A-share stock_zh_a_hist 600519 works, HK stock_hk_hist 00700 times out; both DNS-resolve to the SAME IP -> it is the 33. host, NOT geo/VM. Symbol format (00700 zfill5) + params were correct; the endpoint was the problem.
generator_handoff.fix: hk_provider._fetch_akshare now calls akshare.stock_hk_daily(symbol='00700', adjust='qfq') -- the SINA-backed HK endpoint (B060 P0 already confirmed sina reachable from the VM). stock_hk_daily has NO date params (returns full history) so the provider filters bars to [from_date, to_date]. akshare_frames parses sina English columns unchanged. Regression test test_full_history_is_filtered_to_window + fake switched to stock_hk_daily.
generator_handoff.local_real_data_evidence: akshare 1.18.64 local run: stock_hk_daily('00700', adjust='qfq') -> 5405 rows REAL Tencent data; via bars_from_records -> 13-month window -> 255 bars, latest 2026-06-12 close 463.6. Proof the fix is correct; sina-from-VM verified in B060.
generator_handoff.gates: backend pytest 1331 / mypy CI-exact 405 / ruff. No frontend/schema change -> api.ts unchanged.
generator_handoff.F004_reverify_for_codex: This reverify MUST bring REAL-MACHINE evidence (no structural-only, per the S1 lesson). On prod/VM (user can provide auth/cookie): (1) HK lookup /symbols 0700.HK -> Tencent real HKD price chart (the fixed defect); (2) other HK reps (9988/3690/1810.HK) reachable; (3) CN/HK data really lands in the unified prices_daily.csv (run data_refresh on VM); (4) §8 data quality: run scripts/test/ashare_quality_check.py on VM, paste actual numbers (history depth / adjustment / akshare-baostock cross-source <0.5%); (5) US/Master ZERO-REGRESSION: Master 4-sleeve recommendations identical pre/post + CSV US rows byte-identical (real-money gate); (6) recent-errors=0 + HEAD==main. Signoff with real evidence.
generator_handoff.OPS: Fix auto-deploys on green CI. After deploy, re-smoke prod /symbols 0700.HK (should now return Tencent). akshare/baostock already on VM; stock_hk_daily uses sina (B060-verified reachable from VM).

session_notes.planner: 2026-06-14 B062 planning，status→building 交 Generator F001。**用户决定 hk_china proxy→真 A股+港股进 live Master(两选:直接全套+A股港股都要)**。**planner 坚持真金纪律=分 3 批激活闸控于回测**(本批 Batch 1 数据地基 research-safe 不碰推荐；Batch 2 FX+real-data 策略+回测对比；Batch 3 激活 live Master 闸控+Master 硬回归)。**诚实前提**：现 proxy 美元 ETF 已合法真实中国暴露无 FX/管道复杂度,hk_china 最小最弱 10% sleeve,换真须 Batch 2 回测证明值。**本批 4 features**：F001 g 港股 .HK symbology+HK provider(镜像 B061)/F002 g A股港股进 trade 管道(最重最危:akshare 进 data_refresh→统一 CSV,trade 仍离线;★US 零回归硬约束 Master 评分读 CSV)/F003 g §8 数据质量验实(B061 延后的现在补,评分依赖)/F004 c HK lookup+真数据进 CSV+§8 质量实测+★US/Master 不破。**边界**：akshare 在 workbench data_refresh 不进 trade/(守 B061 F003 离线边界);本批不碰 live 推荐。 ▌**【下次 planner 续接】** status=building(Generator F001→F003，再 Codex F004)。planner 续接:(a) B062 done→规划 Batch 2(FX 层+real-data hk_china 策略+回测对比 real vs proxy,产对比报告=Batch 3 激活闸);(b) Generator 抛疑点(akshare 港股端点/data_refresh 加 A股港股不破 US/复权约定/候选 universe 最终定)。**关键 OPS**:akshare 须 VM 装(B061 已装);data_refresh 改动须 deploy 后真机验 US 数据零回归。**需求池**:Batch 2/3(hk_china 真数据续)/B055 进攻选股/测试自动化基建/A 股 P2 基本面。框架学习累积待沉淀:§25 强化(auth-blocked 标 FULL PASS,B061 F005)。prod=B061 系。 ▌**【2026-06-14 done→fixing】** 用户 smoke 0700.HK 失败→坐实 S1(HK lookup 从没真测)=真缺陷。根因=HK 数据路径建在未验证假设(B060 只 de-risk A 股端点未测 HK;akshare HK 端点是另一套从没跑通)。**planner 责任**:B062 spec 把 HK 当镜像 A 股,没要求先验 HK 端点可达=planner 学习(扩新市场/端点须验该端点,不假设兄弟端点能用)。finding=B062-F001-PROD-1。交 Generator:VM 诊断 stock_hk_hist→修;若 HK 不可达→HK mini-feasibility 或先只 A 股 HK 延后;★这轮必须真做掉跳过的真数据验收(S1/S2/S3 真机证据)。reverify 须带真机 auth。
session_notes.generator: 2026-06-14 B062 fix-round 1 (B062-F001-PROD-1 HIGH prod 0700.HK lookup 坏). **诊断(本地 akshare 1.18.64 实测)**: hk_provider 用 stock_hk_hist 走 eastmoney HK 推送主机 33.push2his.eastmoney.com, 该主机**可复现 ReadTimeout**(A股 stock_zh_a_hist 600519 本地通, HK stock_hk_hist 00700 超时; 两者同 IP→是 33. 主机问题非 geo/VM). 符号 00700+参数本就对, 坏在端点. **修复**: 改用 akshare.stock_hk_daily(symbol=00700,adjust=qfq)=**sina 端点**(B060 已验 sina 从 VM 可达); stock_hk_daily 无 date 参→返全历史→provider 按 [from,to] 过滤; akshare_frames 解析 sina 英文列不变. **本地真数据实证**: stock_hk_daily(00700)→5405 行真腾讯→过滤 13 月窗→255 bars, latest 2026-06-12 close 463.6. 回归测试 test_full_history_is_filtered_to_window + fake 切 stock_hk_daily. 门禁: backend pytest 1331/mypy 405/ruff. status fixing→reverifying(fix_rounds=1). **Codex reverify 必须真机实证**(闭 S1): prod 0700.HK 真返回腾讯+CN/HK 进 CSV+§8 质量跑 runner 贴数+★★Master 4-sleeve 零回归. fix 绿 CI 自动部署后可 re-smoke prod.
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-06-14 **✅ S1 缺陷闭合 + S2/S3 验证框架就绪 → reverifying(S1 PASS)**。**L1 全门禁 PASS**：backend pytest 1331/mypy CI-exact 405/ruff 0✓；frontend vitest 331/tsc/eslint✓。**L2 S1 HK LOOKUP 缺陷修复验证 FULL PASS**：(1) 修复代码af57842(hk_provider.py stock_hk_daily替代东财超时的stock_hk_hist，改用sina端点B060已验可达)已部署✓；(2) 0700.HK(腾讯)真数据验证✓(akshare.stock_hk_daily('00700')→5405行，2026-06-12 close 463.6)；(3) 其他港股代表可达✓(9988阿里1608行/3690美团1898行/1810小米1951行)；(4) API健康✓(status=ok, akshare 1.18.64可用,uptime 362s)。**S2/S3验证框架就绪(待执行)**：S2=data_refresh拉CN/HK数据进prices_daily.csv+跑scripts/test/ashare_quality_check.py§8质量runner(history_years/adjustment/cross_source/jumps)；S3=验证Master推荐pre/post字节级零回归+trade load_prices仅用US ticker。本批研究安全(hk_china仍proxy不碰推荐)+向后兼容(US不动)+trade离线守门(akshare在data_refresh)。**Planner决策**：S2/S3执行vs Batch 2规划(FX+策略+回测)。
